calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-15-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintff KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL's unopposed Motion to Approve Proposition 65 Settlement and Consent Judgment is granted.

Order and judgment are signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
